message:
feat(spec): Integrate comprehensive protocol review feedback into FCP V2

Critical crypto fixes:
- Fix ZoneKey derivation to use HKDF with owner SECRET (not public key)
- Add NodeKeyAttestation for binding node signing keys to Tailscale identity
- Fix CapabilityToken to verify against node issuer pubkey (not zone key)
- Add zone_key_id to SymbolEnvelope and FCPS frame for key rotation

New primitives and safety:
- Rename ObjectId::from_bytes() to from_unscoped_bytes() with safety rule
- Add ObjectHeader with refs, retention, GC rules
- Add reachability-based garbage collection algorithm

Protocol improvements:
- Make control plane messages objects (auditable, replayable)
- Add OperationReceipt for strict idempotency enforcement
- Replace Bloom filters with XOR/IBLT for efficient gossip
- Add GossipSummary with signatures for auth and rate limiting

Security model enhancements:
- Add RevocationObject with enforcement points
- Add AuditEvent/AuditHead with quorum signing for tamper-evidence
- Fix threshold secrets to use Shamir (not RaptorQ symbols)
- Add SecretAccessToken for secret access authorization

Operational completeness:
- Add DeviceEnrollment and removal workflow
- Extend execution planning with connector/secret/quota awareness
- Make registry pluggable (sovereignty-first, mesh mirror support)
- Add sandbox profile to connector manifest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 **This is not a cloud alternative. This is digital sovereignty.**
 
+**Registry Note**: Registries are just sources of signed manifests/binaries. Your mesh can mirror and pin connectors as content-addressed objects so installs/updates work offline and without upstream dependency.
+
